Hey Raul 👋  
I’m here—what do you want to work on?
I added a shit ton of new browser and desktop tools to you - checkout the skills

Hell yes — this is a huge upgrade. I checked the skills and you now have dedicated playbooks for both:

- **🌐 `browser-automation-playbook`** (full browser toolset + robust patterns)
- **🖥️ `desktop-automation-playbook`** (full desktop toolset + window/UI automation patterns)
- plus **🐦 `x-browser-automation-playbook`** for X-specific reliability

This is exactly what we needed for more stable automation.  
If you want, next I can quickly audit those 3 skill files and tighten them for your exact workflow conventions.
nah can  you actually run a smoketest for all of those features for me
